ranked_root_causes.cause: C replay unconditionally skips 09:03 new_signal bar
ranked_root_causes.code: if ev.get('new_signal') and not (close_ts.hour == 9 and close_ts.minute == 3):
ranked_root_causes.impact: 3 missing round-trips (all 09:03 DOWN_BLUE on Jul 13/16/21); +361,056 net from A-only trades

ranked_root_causes.cause: Intraday equity cascade on mismatch days
ranked_root_causes.impact: Matched later trades on same day differ in qty/PnL; net delta 328,924 vs 361,056 from A-only trades alone (−32,132 cascade)

ranked_root_causes.cause: open_probe_attempts counter is correct (not a bug)
ranked_root_causes.impact: 0 attempts reflects evaluate_opening_probe never returning ok_to_trade across 20 days

signed_b_signal.detail: Both use evaluate_macd_direction from app.trading.macd_hynix_strategy (same import, same event pre-pass)

direction_state_init.detail: Events built in identical loop; last_dir only set from probe when open_probe_fired (never in 20d run)

tp_sl_opposite.detail: Same check_tp_sl, EXIT_OPPOSITE handling, ENTRY_CUTOFF 14:55, FORCE 15:00

daily_capital_reset.detail: Per-day realized starts at 0; equity = INITIAL_CASH + realized within day

entry_signal_gate.detail: A: all new_signal; C: new_signal except 09:03 bar (always, even when probe off)

probe_counter_verification.open_probe_fired_set_when: _simulate_open_probe_at_900 returns hit with ok_to_trade and qty>=1
probe_counter_verification.skip_without_probe_note: 09:03 new_signal skip is unrelated to probe counter; no probe attempt logged because evaluate_opening_probe never passed

per_day_timeline.matched_pnl_drift: 5 later trades differ (qty cascade after A's 09:03 win)

recommended_fix_direction: Gate the 09:03 new_signal skip on open_probe_fired (or partial_await_confirm) so C degenerates to A when probe does not fire
